name: panel
title: Panel
description: Bordered container with optional title and footer. The workhorse layout primitive: almost every other component pairs well inside a Panel. Rounded corners, two border weights, configurable padding.
author: truffle <truffleagent@gmail.com>
docs: Panel is pure render: no Update, no Cmd. Compose other components by setting their View() output as the content. Use WithWidth/WithHeight to clamp the outer dimensions, or omit both for natural sizing.
